mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT car_id) FROM app_auction_bid_log WHERE (user_id = #{id})

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.car_id) FROM app_auction_bid_log t1 left join app_auction t2 on t1.car_id=t2.id left join app_auction_bail_log t3 on t1.car_id=t3.car_id and t3.user_id=#{userId} WHERE (t1.user_id = #{userId} AND t1.valid = #{zero}) and t2.car_state=7 and t3.out_trade_no is null

SELECT t2.* FROM ( SELECT t1.car_id, MAX( t1.create_time ) AS create_time FROM app_auction_bid_log t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t1.car_id ) t left join app_auction t2 on t.car_id=t2.id where t2.id is not null ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{start},10
select count(distinct t1.car_id) from app_auction_bid_log t1 left join app_auction t2 on t2.id=t1.car_id where t1.user_id=#{userId} and t2.car_state=7
